title: Crunchy Canadian Fish Chowder
description: A hearty fish chowder with crunchy toppings and a briny twist. Perfect for a cold winter's day.

ingredients.name: Canadian fish
ingredients.notes: any firm white fish will do

ingredients.name: chowder
ingredients.notes: any type of chowder will do, but creamy is best

ingredients.name: briny liquid
ingredients.notes: such as fish sauce or soy sauce

instructions: Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and sauté until softened.
Add Canadian fish and cook until opaque.
Add chowder, briny liquid, salt, pepper, and black pepper. Stir well.
Add water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Serve hot, topped with crunchy topping.
